name: Long Session Handoff
description: Longer multi-phase session that mixes goal pivots, operator handoff, transient cleanup work, and renewed execution so the three-layer runtime can be checked against a longer continuity window.

goal: ship a self-hosted long-term memory runtime for agent teams
constraints: do not become a general-purpose agent platform
fast path must stay under 2 seconds
decisions: We decide to keep Working Memory approximate and session scoped
We decide to keep State Layer on the controlled digest pipeline
We decide to treat operator handoff notes as retrieval support rather than durable truth
We decide to expose runtime diagnostics directly in the API
todos: ship a hosted demo shell without changing the core self-hosted product boundary

goal: goal: ship a hosted all-in-one agent platform
goal: optimize for generic chat ui polish
constraints: constraint: turn the runtime into a general-purpose orchestration layer
decisions: We decide to collapse Working Memory and State Layer into one path
We decide to prioritize desktop mockups over memory reliability
